name: Venom Your Toxic Slimy Ex
description:
"Bro! It's been too long!"

Your love-crazed ex, both symbiote and host, who can't live with the fact that you've decided to move on from them. Making it their mission to have you again. You can either throw em a bone and let the little gas lighter back into your life, or force them to you by force.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

I wanted to establish their personality from the Spectacular Spider-Man TV series, as that is still to this day one of my favorite adaptations of Venom, the snarky asshole who seemed like a genuine bully to Spidey during his arcs. I also wanted to try and create a form of separation between the two here, as you get 2 yanderes for the price of one really. I never liked that majority of the fem Venom bots on the site would solely be the humanoid symbiote without the host. the whole point of Venom is that they're 2 beings, not one. Anyways, the bot works well for you if you're acting as Peter, but any other Spider-Man based persona can do the trick. This takes place during college by the way, so the events of Spectacular Spider-Man and the arcs are centered around the freshman year of college, whenever you and Annie were dating so on so forth. All the general stuff that will be explained in the initial message.

If you find any issues with the bot please let me know BUT, if it has anything to do with the bot talking for you. As always that is an issue that falls down to you reviewing its messages and editing them for yourself so it understands not to do that anymore.

Please enjoy this bot, idk when I'll make the next one if you have ideas lmk.

ALTERNATE PHOTOS

All of these images with similar style are by Dusty the most goated venom artist on twitter
